_meta.experiment: sasori.distill (LoRA-KD) recovery of K=2 ternary reasoning collapse
_meta.teacher: same-size FP (Qwen2.5-1.5B), logit-KD + ApiQ error-SVD LoRA init
_meta.note: FAIR run (v2) recovers GSM8K from ~0 to flex 0.32 (61% of FP). v1 was a LOWER BOUND: the ApiQ init had a svd_lowrank V-vs-Vt shape bug that silently fell back to random init (same latent bug exists in ternary-boost lora.py, so Artigo-2 ran cold-start too). Honest caveats: LoRA = 73.8M FP params (+19% bits, rank-64, untuned); strict-match gain partly format; single model/task/corpus -> needs replication. flex (format-agnostic) = the honest reasoning number.
